description: Transform AI Chat into a sliding side panel that can be detached as a floating draggable window. Change Spotify mini player button to vertical-only drag on right edge.
steps: Refactor frontend/components/chat/AIChatPanel.tsx: Keep the existing slide-from-right panel behavior. Add a 'detach' button in the header (e.g., an icon like 'ExternalLink' or 'Maximize2' from lucide-react). When detached, the panel becomes a draggable floating window (using framer-motion drag like SpotifyMiniPlayer does). The floating window should have a title bar for dragging, be resizable or fixed-size (400x500px), and have a button to 're-attach' (snap back to slide panel). Use framer-motion's drag prop with dragMomentum={false}.

Update frontend/app/dashboard/layout.tsx: Add state for 'detached' mode. Pass detached/onDetach/onAttach props to AIChatPanel. When detached, the panel should NOT show the backdrop overlay (since it is floating). The FAB button should still toggle visibility even in detached mode.

Refactor frontend/components/SpotifyMiniPlayer.tsx: In the snapped (collapsed) state, the button is on the right edge. Change it to be draggable ONLY vertically. Use framer-motion's drag='y' prop to constrain movement to vertical axis only. The button stays pinned to the right edge (right: 0) but the user can drag it up/down to reposition. Save the Y position to localStorage. Remove the free-drag expanded card behavior - it should only be a side button that expands to show the player when clicked, but the button itself moves only vertically.
Ensure the floating AI chat window has proper z-index (above other content, z-[90] or similar) and does not interfere with the Spotify button or other fixed elements.
acceptance_criteria: AI Chat slides in from the right as a panel (existing behavior preserved)
A 'detach' button in the AI Chat header converts it to a floating draggable window
The floating AI Chat window can be dragged anywhere on screen
A button on the floating window re-attaches it back to the side panel
Spotify button is on the right edge and can be dragged vertically only (up/down)
Spotify button position (Y) persists across page loads via localStorage
npm run build passes without errors
findings: Build and lint pass cleanly. Used inline styles for button positioning instead of styled-jsx for better compatibility. The detached floating window uses framer-motion drag on the entire container div. Drag constraints for the Spotify button are calculated dynamically based on viewport height and current top position.
